parents.subject: LU-18993 osc: Add separate read/write RPC latency histograms

commit.subject: LU-18813 osd-wbcfs: remove legacy mount support
commit.message:
LU-18813 osd-wbcfs: remove legacy mount support

Lustre only supports kernels that support the new
fs_context mount API. Remove legacy mount support
from wbcfs.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: Id07880e28c8155336cacbf47cdd9f04925893b82
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60589
Reviewed-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Lijing Chen <nlfoxus@gmail.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
